detail.description: The Better Choice Prime Alt Doc Variable Home Loan offers a standard variable loan for loans between $2.50M to $5.00M with the option to use alternative forms to verify income. Available up to 70% LVR, this loan suits borrowers that are looking for flexibility with their home loan and investment properties
detail.name: Prime Alt Doc Jumbo (BNK)

constraints.additionalInfo: The maximum acceptable LVR for this product is 70%
The minimum loan balance for this product is $2,500,000.
The maximum loan amount for this product can not exceed $5mil ($5,000,000)

eligibility.additionalInfo:
The customer must also meet Better Choice’s credit criteria, including demonstration of ability to meet
repayment obligations offer acceptable residential property as security

A company and meet the following requirements:
- Satisfactory investigation by BNK; and
- Company borrowing being supported by the personal guarantee of the director(s). Guarantees
from companies & trusts are not acceptable
An Australian corporate trustee as trustee for a family trust, (provided the corporate trustee is a nontrading entity) and the family trust beneficiaries are all individuals
be an Australian citizen or Australian permanent resident (limited exceptions may apply subject to conditions)
eligibility.additionalValue: An Australian citizen, permanent resident or Australian resident for tax purposes

features.additionalInfo: If you have a variable loan you can make as many extra payments as you want, with no penalty at anytime
Fully transactional 100% Offset Account. Note Better Choice offset sub-accounts do not have access by cards.
Pay interest only. You can pay just the interest for up to 5 years for both Owner Occupied and Investment properties

fees.name: Variation Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Conversion - Convert to Fixed Rate (Full or Partial), Interest Only, Principal & Interest, Full Doc

fees.name: Solicitors Fees
fees.additionalInfo: Solicitor Fees for Substitution of Security - At cost

fees.name: Discharge (Full or partial)
fees.additionalInfo:
Discharging a loan - $390 per security
+ 3rd Party costs
per security ($220
per additional
security)

fees.name: Discharge (Full or Partial): Solicitors Fees
fees.additionalInfo: Solicitors Fees for discharging a loan - At cost

fees.name: Loan Top Up
fees.additionalInfo: This fee is incurred when a customer requests an increase for an existing loan

fees.name: Valuation Fees
fees.additionalInfo: Valuation Fees when a new valuation is required for the property for increasing of an existing mortgage

fees.name: Solicitor Fees
fees.additionalInfo: Solicitors fees for when the loan is altered and solicitors need to provide/amend documents for increasing of existing mortgage

fees.name: Discharge (Partial): Valuation Fees From
fees.additionalInfo: Discharge (Partial): Valuation Fees From - At cost

fees.name: Valuation Fee
fees.additionalInfo: An at-cost fee that is relevant to a customer's circumstances where the amount or rate may not be known until negotiated with the customer. This fee relates to the valuation of the property required for the application to assist in determining the LVR

fees.name: Documentation Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Documentation Fee for preparing loan contract and other documentation
